import React from 'react'; import './About.css'; const About = () => { return (

About Me

Umme Habiba is a passionate UI/UX designer specializing in mobile and web interface design.

She creates modern, user-friendly digital experiences through research, wireframing, prototyping, and visual design in Figma.

Her approach combines usability, aesthetics, and real-world problem solving.

She is currently pursuing an MBA alongside hands-on UX design projects and internships.

); }; export default About;
